name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReadinessGate blocks live validation until powered source support transient probes complete targets and temporal resolution are available.
note: Primary readiness gate for live A4MC surface wake validation.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTemporalResolution supplies per-target timing and substep requirements.
note: Temporal target input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit supplies transient arrival-time bounds used by the temporal targets.
note: Transit timing input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceProbeMap supplies rotor-resolved ground and ceiling probe identities.
note: Spatial probe identity input.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies the powered-hover source context required before live wake validation.
note: Powered-source context input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live powered-source transient surface wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.

name: live_validation_gate_rule
value: Live surface wake validation requires powered-source API support transient probe API support all 128 expected rotor-surface-clearance targets target-level probe availability no runtime coupling and an applied sample period no larger than the strictest fast-transit target.
note: Method note for audit-only surface wake validation readiness.
